summary: The student's current level is around Band 6.0-6.5 across the four skills, with weaknesses in specific areas such as over-general supporting ideas in Writing Task 2, limited vocabulary in Speaking, and careless errors in Reading and Listening. To reach the target band of 7.5, the student needs to focus on developing more precise and nuanced language, improving coherence and cohesion, and reducing errors.
priorities: Improve Writing Task 2 by developing more specific and detailed supporting ideas
Enhance vocabulary in Speaking to provide more precise and nuanced answers
Reduce careless errors in Reading and Listening by improving attention to detail and understanding of question types

tasks: Analyse and identify areas for improvement in previous Writing Task 2 essays
Practise writing more specific and detailed supporting ideas using the 'Basic → Advanced Upgrades' vocabulary list
Practise using more precise and nuanced vocabulary in Speaking Part 2 answers
Record and review own speaking to identify areas for improvement
Practise TFNG questions using Cambridge IELTS practice tests (e.g. cambridge-14-test2 Reading Passage 3)
Review and analyse mistakes in previous Reading practices to identify areas for improvement
Practise form completion and map labelling questions using Cambridge IELTS practice tests
Review and analyse mistakes in previous Listening practices to identify areas for improvement
Write a full Writing Task 2 essay using the improved vocabulary and supporting ideas
Review and edit the essay to reduce errors and improve coherence and cohesion
Practise Speaking Part 3 answers using more abstract and nuanced language
Record and review own speaking to identify areas for improvement
Take a full IELTS practice test to assess progress and identify areas for further improvement
Review and analyse mistakes to inform future study
